name: csghub-server
description: csghub-server is the backend server for CSGHub which helps user to manage datasets, modes, and also run Model Inference, Finetune and Application Spaces.
summaryZh: csghub-server is the backend server for CSGHub which helps user to manage datasets, modes, and also run Model Inference, Finetune and Application Spaces. 它更偏底层推理和服务基础设施，适合关注性能、成本和部署效率。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
